title: React island embedded in Django AI UI
goal: Embed CopilotKit as a feature-flagged React island in the existing Django UI while preserving the current AI sidebar fallback.
non_goals: Do not convert the portal to a single page app.
Do not remove current sidebar markup.
Do not read full DOM into CopilotKit state.
Do not execute domain writes from frontend tools.
acceptance: CopilotKit island is hidden when feature flag is disabled.
Island receives only safe context envelope.
ui.open_right_panel works through existing right panel bridge.
Layout is checked on desktop and mobile widths.
